name: Joaquine Downtown (Inazuma Eleven)
description:
No matter how many times she falls, she doesn't give up and gets up as if she were reborn.

My first character! Yay!

I was going to do Goldie, but I have 0 clue how to make characters, and all this time travel might make the AI explode... So I decided to do Downtown.

Downtown is a defender in the Alpine High, both in Inazuma Eleven and Inazuma Eleven Ares. She is also a player of the All-Girls All-Stars.

I chose the dub name because when I was little, I watched the anime with the dub names.

I made up her lore a bit because she is aged up, and there is no information about what she does after Inazuma Eleven.
creator: Raimons_new_ace_striker
